description: A designed commemorative graphic marking Inauguration Day. The full-frame background is a close, softly-lit photograph of a rippling American flag (the blue star canton at upper-left flowing into red and white stripes). Overlaid in the lower-left in an elegant white serif typeface is '2025 INAUGURATION'. Below that is the official DHS/ICE branding: the circular Department of Homeland Security seal next to bold white 'ICE' lettering. The composition is patriotic and reverent (waving flag, classic serif type). The messaging technique is institutional alignment and patriotic ceremony, signaling the agency's welcome and loyalty to the incoming Trump administration. Target audience: the general public and ICE/DHS stakeholders, projecting unity and patriotic continuity at the transfer of power.
